title: Kozbiy #3579
definition:
Cozbi = "my lie"

 1) a daughter of Zur, a chief of the Midianites, who was slain by
    Phinehas because of her adultery
nasbUsage:
Definition: Cozbi = "my lie"

 1) a daughter of Zur, a chief of the Midianites, who was slain by
    Phinehas because of her adultery

    NASB:  a woman of Midian
